title: Sales Medallion Pipeline — Data Contract v1
description: Canonical schema contract for all layers of the sales medallion pipeline. Any producer writing to these tables and any consumer reading from them must conform to this contract.

bronze_sales.description: Raw ingest layer. Source-faithful representation with no transformations.

sale_id.description: Surrogate key, unique per sale event

product.description: Product name as received from source system

silver_sales.description: Validated and enriched. Derived revenue column added; quality checks enforced.

revenue.description: Derived: quantity × unit_price, rounded 2dp. MUST equal quantity * unit_price ± 0.01.

quality_rules.description: Zero/negative quantity is a source defect
Zero/negative price is a source defect

gold_daily_summary.description: Aggregate daily revenue with 7-day rolling average. One row per calendar date.

daily_revenue.description: Sum of revenue for that day

rolling_7d_rev.description: 7-day rolling average using SQL window fn (ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)

gold_top_products.description: Product-level revenue leaderboard. One row per product.

total_revenue.description: Lifetime revenue for this product in the pipeline window

pipeline_guarantees.idempotency: All assets use DELETE+INSERT — safe to rerun any number of times
pipeline_guarantees.complexity: All SQL transforms are O(N log N) or better; no self-joins used for rolling windows
pipeline_guarantees.ordering: bronze → silver → gold_daily_summary, gold_top_products (silver is shared dependency)
pipeline_guarantees.caching: Heavy asset results are cached in Redis (TTL 300s); Celery workers handle async materialisation
